← all 383 games

Face-Controlled Games

Your face is the controller. Smile to flap, raise your eyebrows to jump, pucker to shoot, look away to dodge. These games use your camera directly in the browser — all processing happens on your device, nothing is recorded or uploaded, and the camera turns off when you leave. Fair warning: you will make ridiculous faces, and it is even funnier watching someone else play.

VIRAL

Flappy Face

open your mouth to flap

beat the pipes
VIRAL

Brow Lift

surprised-face recordable

lift past the gaps
VIRAL

Head Dodge

head-bob recordable

dodge 20 blocks
VIRAL

Big Smile

forced-grin recordable

max the bloom
VIRAL

Blink Shoot

over-blink recordable

beat the run
VIRAL

Kiss Cam

duck-face recordable

pop 30 hearts
VIRAL

Cheek Float

chipmunk-cheeks recordable

float to the top
VIRAL

Drop Dodge FACE

dodge falling blocks with your head — lean left, lean right

beat the dodges record
VIRAL

Look Away

it points — you look the OTHER way

how many dodges before it gets you
VIRAL

Infinite Fall: Face

lean your head to steer the fall

beat the floors record — with your face

Questions

How do face-controlled games work?

The browser reads your camera and tracks facial landmarks (smile, brows, head direction) on your device in real time. One gesture equals one tap. Nothing is recorded, stored or uploaded.

Do I need to install an app for camera games?

No — these run in the normal browser on your phone or laptop. You just grant camera permission for the tab and revoke it any time.

Are face games safe for privacy?

The camera feed is processed entirely on your device and never leaves it. Close the tab and the camera is off.
